scripts.install:server: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && pnpm install'
scripts.dev: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && ( [ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install ) && pnpm dev'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && ( [ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install ) && pnpm build'
scripts.preview: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && ( [ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install ) && pnpm preview'
scripts.lint: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && ( [ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install ) && pnpm lint'
scripts.type-check: bash -lc 'git submodule update --init --recursive && cd invoice-server && ( [ -d node_modules ] || pnpm install ) && pnpm type-check'
